name: Springfield
content:
Springfield is easily the weirdest place I’ve ever been. I had a train change in Springfield, and I had enough time to leave the station and grab a sandwich and some coffee before my next train. Everything was fine, it’s just that every interaction with another person I had felt off. A man asked me what time it was, and I guessed around three o’clock, which didn’t satisfy the man. When I told him it was exactly 3:02, he started walking faster and yelling about how he was going to “miss [his] FUCKING bus,” how he would have to walk instead of taking the bus, and how much “[his] feet FUCKING hurt and [he doesn’t] WANT to WALK all the way.” This continued as he faded into the distance. After getting coffee, I watched a lady pull up to a stop sign in a car, take a drag from a cigarette, take a swig of beer, and continue driving. I never felt in danger, just a continuous sense of bemusement.
On second thought, I suppose things make more sense if I consider every resident of Springfield to be a Simpsons character.
